meta.title: Workinabox — Companies, in a box.
meta.description: An agentic system that runs the work — software, ops, marketing, sales. Write the spec. Workinabox executes, reports, and tells you when it's blocked. Ships as software, or as a physical box on your desk.

hero.lede: An agentic system that runs the work — software, ops, marketing, sales. Write the spec. Workinabox executes, reports, and tells you when it's blocked. Ships as software, or as a physical box on your desk.

features.p: Humans write the spec. Agents execute, report, and ask when blocked. Nothing happens without a spec.
Push, pull, delegate, escalate. The system runs verticals — engineering, ops, marketing — under one roof.
Input, retrieval, execution — every step audited. Destructive actions require approval. Always.
Run it on your hardware, your VMs, your containers — or order it as the literal box. No cloud lock-in.
